---
name: Example or counterexample
about: Propose a safe worked example, failure case, or no-action scenario
title: "[Example] "
labels: example,counterexample
assignees: ""
---

## Scenario type

Choose one: coordination, search, matching, bargaining, repeated cooperation,
mediation, harmful intervention, no action, other.

## Agents and context

Describe the agents and their goals using synthetic or fully abstracted details.

## Information structure

What does each agent know? What does the idealized mediator know?

## Mediator action

What could the mediator recommend, ask, introduce, warn, negotiate, delay, or
decline to do?

## Expected lesson

What does this example show about the solvability boundary?

## Safety check

- [ ] This example is synthetic or safely abstracted.
- [ ] This issue does not include private, personal, sensitive, confidential, or
      non-consensual real-world information.
